Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Galactic Union]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — The Galactic Union certifies Archmages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — The Galactic Union is the largest interplanetary government in civilized space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union fleet controls one half of the divided system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union is an organization where a woman Varic knows is currently fighting the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union has a fleet in the system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union has troops that subdued the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union achieved a victory in the Evven-Fahr system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The Galactic Union is a political entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Galactic Union has laws that the narrator's ship recommends not defying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Galactic Union is a space-faring organization that the narrator has left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Galactic Union has a generic corporate appearance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Galactic Union operates destroyers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The protagonist is aboard a Galactic Union battleship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — The Galactic Union has soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Galactic Union has operational squads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Galactic Union colonies are giant metal wheels with people crammed inside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Galactic Union is a political entity that can declare individuals traitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — The Galactic Union has an investigation team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Galactic Union appoints investigators for incidents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Galactic Union provides reports to Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Galactic Union warns of sudden movements from the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Galactic Union has territory that the ship is skirting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — The Galactic Union is represented by military officers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Iron Legion is focusing on the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Galactic Union does not bow to threats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Varic Vallenar is on the Galactic Union's execution list.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Galactic Union is being invaded by the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The Iron King is pushing into Galactic Union territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The Galactic Union is a political entity that President Vashei led.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Hives are pushing into Galactic Union territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — The Lagomorph commandos wear armor resembling Galactic Union battle-armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Galactic Union is controlled by a secret organization.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — Galactic Union colonies are characterized by rings of gray metal floating in space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union has space that is nominally held but sparsely populated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — Doctor Mell was located in Galactic Union space when she was captured.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — The Galactic Union is controlled by the shadow organization Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — The Galactic Union is a political entity with a President.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — The students are leaving the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Galactic Union is a political entity that does not recognize spoils of war in galactic law.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Galactic Union refuses to take the Captain's calls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Galactic Union possesses dreadnoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Galactic Union permitted the mixed fleet into their territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Galactic Union is one of the four corners of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Galactic Union is a governing body that controls space in the Thevellian System in name only.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Galactic Union is an organization with ships that were destroyed in the chapter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The Galactic Union has ships that can explode.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — A Galactic Union battlegroup pushed into the narrator's lines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The Advocates decapitated the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — The Galactic Union is a centralized galactic entity with Fathom at its heart.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Galactic Union soldiers share horror stories about Karoshan soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — The Galactic Union maintains a military outpost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — The Galactic Union has placed a bounty on the narrator and Mell's heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The Galactic Union has used magic to root out those who question their policies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — The Galactic Union is an entity that the team must not allow to have Zenith technology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The Galactic Union previously cobbled together a fleet with the Karoshan Alliance and Starhammer to kill the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The Galactic Union held up the narrator during a conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Galactic Union once performed a takeover that resulted in splinter factions fleeing to Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Galactic Union is a group that provides support to King Regent Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — The crew can inform the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Galactic Union is described as hostile.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Galactic Union is a group of influential leaders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Galactic Union is an entity that Universal Manufacturing aims to influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — The Galactic Union is controlled by a criminal organization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — The Magic Tower is an institution of the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Taking materials from the Grand Hive without starting a war with the Galactic Union is impractical.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Galactic Union aims for unity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Last Horizon fighting for the Galactic Union would help Solstice convince the galaxy they are on their side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism and Divide are cooperating with the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Galactic Union is a group containing many resources.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Captain threatens to go to war with the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — A heavily armored Galactic Union cargo ship emerges from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Galactic Union has military forces at the disposal of Void Prism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Galactic Union has defense satellites used to destroy invading starships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Galactic Union ships were retreating from the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Zenith Starship declared war on the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Galactic Union is in a state of tension with the Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Galactic Union allowed the militia to rush to their deaths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Galactic Union occupied the ruins of a former docking hangar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Galactic Union is attempting to trap The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The Galactic Union can pick up reinforcements from almost anywhere in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The Galactic Union was unable to reach Leilari or Starhammer's connections.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Galactic Union is an entity that the crew of The Last Horizon has made enemies with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 33''' — The Galactic Union experiences instances of corruption that can be traced back to Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — The Galactic Union's magical community is assumed to be with the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The Lichborn home world is in an important position in the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Galactic Union has ongoing engagements with the Iron Legion along its border with Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — The Galactic Union instigated a civil war that tore the galaxy in half.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 41''' — The Galactic Union has an underbelly with contacts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Lutoch possesses a Galactic Union ID.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Solstice controls the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Omega assassinated the Galactic Union president.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The Galactic Union would set its sights on the Karoshan Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Fathom is the capital of the Galactic Union.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
